meaning: adj.喃喃鸣不平的,出怨言的
examples: Although he was only grumbling, his choice of words made Rodney angry.
Nothing pleased him. He was always grumbling.
They kept grumbling that they were cold.
But so far nobody, despite much grumbling, has shown that Google is abusing that power.
All exporters are grumbling, but miners, despite efforts to hedge against currency swings, seem especially pained.
